value_chain_position: Electrical enclosures, thermal management and power-distribution equipment supplier — occupies the power-and-cooling and electrification-components layer, selling into data centers, industrial and EV-charging infrastructure.
relative_comps: NVT is a genuine toll-taker in data-center power enclosures and thermal management alongside VRT; its 40% revenue YoY growth and 19% 3-year CAGR reflect strong hyperscaler pull-through. FCF margin (8.8%) is lower than VRT but balance sheet is stronger (1.6x leverage vs VRT). Trades at a premium to legacy ETN on growth expectations but is more exposed to project-cycle timing than software-like peers. The dual ai_infrastructure and energy_transition placement is valid per taxonomy notes.
